description: Band gap, DOS/PDOS, Bader charge analysis

trends.Br_effect: Br 4p contributes to VBM -> slight gap reduction
trends.PS4_framework: Invariant across compositions (P-S covalent bonds unchanged)
trends.notes: Mechanical property changes are ionic in origin, not covalent.

bader.Br_polarizability: Higher -> less charge transfer -> weaker bonds
bader.rhombo_issue: FFT grid problem in rhombo cells -> use pp.x plot_num=21 (all-electron)
